task: Classify the sentiment of a customer support message as exactly one word: positive, negative, or neutral.

examples.input: Your product completely changed how my team works. Absolutely thrilled!
I've emailed three times and still no response. This is unacceptable.
Can you tell me what time your support line opens on weekdays?
The onboarding was a bit confusing but support sorted it out quickly.
The app crashes every time I open the reports tab. Very frustrating.
I'd like to update the credit card on file for my account.
